programs.title: Bossam - Steal the Fate
programs.desc: Ba Wu and Su Gyeong escape Yi I Cheom's guards with Dae Yeop's help.

programs.title: Bossam - Steal the Fate
programs.desc: Su Gyeong sees no other option but to end her life by jumping into the river, but Ba Wu saves her.

programs.title: Bossam - Steal the Fate
programs.desc: Dae Yeop asks Su Gyeong to return, but she refuses; guards sent by Yi I Cheom kidnap Su Gyeong.

programs.title: Bossam - Steal the Fate
programs.desc: King Gwanghae plans to pressure Yi I Cheom; Yi becomes even more determined to find Su Gyeong.

programs.title: Bossam - Steal the Fate
programs.desc: Ba Wu and Dae Yeop save Chun Bae; Ba Wu learns that Dae Yeop's father is their family enemy.

programs.title: Bossam - Steal the Fate
programs.desc: Dae Yeop informs I Cheom about Gwanghae-gun and Kim Gae Si's search for Su Gyeong.
